description: Letter from an unknown sender, in Jerusalem, to Samḥūn b. Yaḥyā al-Maghribī, in Fustat. In Judaeo-Arabic. "Spanish" layout, including shape of the right margin and position of the address at the top of recto. Mentions Damascus, a scary situation, Nāblus, Shelomo Ibn Ḥabīb, and various business matters. Also mentions Shelomo b. Efrayim ha-Kohen. Uncited in the literature and needs examination.
description_he: מכתב מירושלים לסמחון בן יחיא אל-מגרבי בפוסטאט ביהודית-ערבית; פריסה 'ספרדית'; מזכיר דמשק, שכם, שלמה בן חביב ועניינים עסקיים
